message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.57

Release 0.1.57 includes the following changes since v0.1.56:

## Bug Fixes
- fix(sync): replace unwrap_or with explicit UTF-8 error handling in rsync path
  - Prevents silent fallback to wrong directory on invalid UTF-8 paths
  - Returns clear error message instead of potential data loss
- fix(tui): avoid unwrap on digit parse
  - Defensive handling for malformed numeric input
- fix(connectors): harden parsing and paths
  - Improved robustness in connector file path handling

## CI/Infrastructure
- ci: add ACFS checksum update notification workflow
- chore: sync lockfile and add ACFS dispatch

## Maintenance
- chore(beads): sync base state

This release continues the project's commitment to defensive programming
and eliminating potential panic points in production code paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
